novel_features.name: Local sync
novel_features.description: Pull messages, events, threads, and contacts for one or all grants into a local SQLite mirror with per-(grant, resource) cursors so re-runs are incremental.

novel_features.name: Since-window query
novel_features.description: Query the local mirror for resources changed in the last N (e.g. 2h, 24h) across all grants in one shot.

novel_features.name: Cross-grant FTS search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search over messages, threads, events, and contacts spanning every connected grant in a single query (use --type to filter by resource).

novel_features.name: Export
novel_features.description: Stream the local mirror (or a filtered slice) to NDJSON for downstream analytics tools like DuckDB or notebooks.

novel_features.name: Contact gravity
novel_features.description: Rank contacts by cross-grant interaction weight (sent + received + meeting-attended), unified by email address.

novel_features.name: Response-time analytics
novel_features.description: Compute median and p90 first-response latency on threads where the grant-holder replied, sliced by grant or counterparty domain.

novel_features.name: Webhook replay
novel_features.description: Re-fire any past webhook delivery from the local store into a local handler URL, optionally filtered by trigger or grant.

novel_features.name: Send-preview confirm-by-hash
novel_features.description: Use --dry-run to print the exact wire payload for any grants messages send call; pair with --yes (or --agent) to bypass interactive confirmation only when you've reviewed the preview.

novel_features.name: Idempotent send
novel_features.description: Pass the global --idempotent flag so an already-existing create result is treated as a successful no-op, making the send safe to retry inside an agent loop.

novel_features.name: Grants doctor
novel_features.description: Health-check every grant: token expiry, missing scopes for advertised features, recent webhook failures, sync lag.

novel_features.name: SQL escape hatch
novel_features.description: Read-only SQL query against the local mirror with --json output.

novel_features.name: Agent mode
novel_features.description: Single flag that forces --json --compact --no-input --no-color --yes defaults so any read command is LLM-safe in one switch.
